title: Time Based Key-Value Store
pattern: Design â€” Hashmap of Sorted Lists with Binary Search
coreIdea: Support storing multiple timestamped values per key and retrieving the value with the largest timestamp <= a queried timestamp, using binary search on a per-key list of (timestamp, value) pairs kept in insertion (naturally sorted) order.
recognitionCues: key-value store where values are versioned by timestamp
asks for 'most recent value at or before a given time', not exact match
approach: Maintain a hashmap from key to a list of (timestamp, value) pairs, appended in increasing timestamp order (since set calls are assumed non-decreasing in timestamp). For get, binary search the key's list for the rightmost timestamp <= queried timestamp, return its value (or empty string if none found).
timeComplexity: O(1) for set, O(log n) for get
